name: aspens
description: Generate and maintain AI-ready documentation for any codebase

scripts.postinstall:
echo '
  📌 aspens v0.2.2: Skill activation hooks are now required.
     If you have existing skills, run: aspens doc init --hooks-only

  🌲 aspens is in active development — please keep it up to date.
     Run into issues? Let us know: https://github.com/aspenkit/aspens/issues
'
